title: Doppler: HTTP 429 maps to Backend instead of Unavailable
description:
## Problem
In secretx-doppler/src/lib.rs, map_http_status() maps HTTP 429 Too Many Requests to SecretError::Backend (permanent). Callers implementing retry-on-Unavailable will never retry after a rate-limit response, treating a transient throttle as a permanent failure.

## Expected behavior
HTTP 429 → SecretError::Unavailable (transient, callers should retry with backoff)

## Reference
GCP SM backend correctly maps 429 → Unavailable in the same pattern. Fix: add `|| status == 429` to the Unavailable branch in map_http_status().

## Acceptance
Unit test: map_http_status(429) returns Unavailable. cargo test -p secretx-doppler passes.
